center.name: W. E. Clyde Todd
center.summary: W. E. Clyde Todd是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联3种鸟类，包括Olive-green tyrannulet、Zimmer's tody-tyrant、Amazonian scrub flycatcher，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Figueiredo, Amazonas, Brazil.jpg | image_caption = Amazonian scrub flycatcher at Presidente Figueiredo, Amazonas state, Brazil | status = LC | status_system = IUCN3.1 | status_ref = | genus = Sublegatus | species = obscurior | authority = Todd, 1920 | synonyms = | range_map = Sublegatus obscurior map.svg }} The Amazonian scrub flycatcher or Todd's scrub flycatcher (Sublegatus obscurior) is a species of bird in the family Tyrannidae, the tyrant flycatchers. It is found in every mainland South American country except Argentina, Chile, Paraguay, and Uruguay.Remsen, J

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The olive-green tyrannulet (Phylloscartes virescens) is a species of bird in the family Tyrannidae, the tyrant flycatchers. It is found in Brazil, French Guiana, Guyana, and Suriname.Remsen, J

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Zimmer's tody-tyrant (Hemitriccus minimus) is a species of bird in the family Tyrannidae, the tyrant flycatchers. It is found in Bolivia, Brazil, Ecuador, and Peru.Remsen, J

It is found in every mainland South American country except Argentina, Chile, Paraguay, and Uruguay.Remsen, J
